# PII Vault

> Presidio-compatible PII detection, anonymization, and reversible tokenization. Multi-language (Rust, TypeScript, Python, Go, WASM). Zero runtime dependencies.

## What is PII Vault?

PII Vault is an open-source library for detecting and anonymizing Personally Identifiable Information (PII) in text. It provides:

- 39 built-in regex recognizers covering 20 countries
- 51 PII entity types (email, SSN, credit card, IBAN, passport, ID numbers, etc.)
- 5 anonymization strategies: Replace, Mask, Hash, Redact, and reversible Vault tokenization
- Checksum validators (Luhn, IBAN Mod 97, Chinese ID, German Tax ID, Australian ABN/TFN/ACN/Medicare)
- Context-aware confidence scoring
- Spec-driven: all patterns defined in JSON, shared across all language implementations

## Install

```
cargo add pii-vault       # Rust
npm install pii-vault      # TypeScript/JavaScript
pip install pii-vault      # Python
go get github.com/Jiansen/pii-vault/go  # Go
```

## Live Demo (WASM, runs in browser)

https://jiansen.github.io/pii-vault/

## Key Differentiators vs Presidio

1. **Zero dependencies**: No spaCy, stanza, or transformers needed
2. **Multi-language native**: Rust + TypeScript (not Python-only)
3. **WASM**: Runs in the browser, 1.2MB, no server needed
4. **Vault**: Deterministic reversible tokenization (Presidio only has AES encrypt/decrypt)
5. **Spec-driven**: JSON patterns shared across all implementations
6. **Performance**: Rust native speed

## Supported Entity Types

EMAIL_ADDRESS, PHONE_NUMBER, CREDIT_CARD, CRYPTO, IP_ADDRESS, MAC_ADDRESS, IBAN_CODE, URL, UUID, US_SSN, US_ITIN, US_PASSPORT, US_DRIVER_LICENSE, UK_NHS, UK_NINO, CN_ID_CARD, CN_PHONE, CN_PASSPORT, IN_AADHAAR, IN_PAN, AU_ABN, AU_ACN, AU_TFN, AU_MEDICARE, DE_TAX_ID, DE_PASSPORT, DE_ID_CARD, DE_VAT_ID, DE_HANDELSREGISTER, IT_FISCAL_CODE, ES_NIE, ES_NIF, KR_RRN, SG_NRIC, FI_PERSONAL_ID, SE_PERSONAL_NUMBER, PL_PESEL, JP_MY_NUMBER, FR_NIR, CA_SIN, BR_CPF
